plugin.name: php-periscope
plugin.description: Live observability + time-travel debugger for Laravel. Pauses any request, surfaces every variable / SQL query / log / job / event / cache hit / Redis command / outbound HTTP call up to the paused line — and lets you scrub backward in time. Step Back button works (Xdebug never has it).
plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0-alpha

  • Initial release. DAP client + Run/Debug configuration.
  • Step Over / Step Into / Step Out / Step Back.
  • Breakpoints (incl. conditional), variables, watches, evaluate.
